questionHtml: Outline how the rate of water uptake is recorded in this potometer.
markschemeHtml:
a. measure distance «of movement» of air bubble/water in capillary tube 

b. multiply by cross section of capillary 

c. record/divide by time elapsed

Allow any other valid method.

meta.title: Outline how the rate of water uptake is recorded in this potometer.
